title: IPO counterfeit goods research (Wave 4)
body: " If you would like to read this report in a PDF format, please choose ‘Print this page’ and click the option to print to PDF. To include chart detail, select ‘Change to table and accessible view’   This is the fourth wave of a survey of 5,000 UK adults (aged 18+). Those who completed the survey discussed their buying history and habits, including counterfeit goods. The survey covered six broad product categories:   beauty and hygiene clothing, footwear and accessories sports toys electricals alcohol   The report is supported by data tables, which provide figures and percentages for each chart.  The survey was developed in consultation with the relevant industry and trade bodies.  This research was delivered by AudienceNet on behalf of the IPO.  "
